chain.thought: Explanation: I counted how many times each team appears in the “winner” column. The New York Giants are listed as the winner 10 times, and the Philadelphia Eagles are listed as the winner 13 times. Interpreting “must be counted” as occurrences where the team is the winner and “not counted” as occurrences where the team is not the winner (out of 23 total games), the Giants have 10 counted and 13 not counted; the Eagles have 13 counted and 10 not counted.

Explanation: Counting occurrences in the Winner column (23 total games):
- New York Giants are winners in rows 1, 2, 3, 7, 12, 13, 14, 17, 18, 19 = 10 times. Thus, counted = 10 and not counted (when they are not winners) = 23 - 10 = 13.
- Philadelphia Eagles are winners in rows 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 11, 15, 16, 20, 21, 22, 23 = 13 times. Thus, counted = 13 and not counted = 23 - 13 = 10.
These match the Prediction Answer.
